--- Main Page ---
Nahm Fine Thai Cuisine - Alpharetta
map marker pin
5310 Windward Pkwy W, Alpharetta,  30004
Welcome to NAHM Fine Thai Cuisine
At Nahm Fine Thai Cuisine, we give you a taste of Thailand; we are committed to showing
you our passion for our culture and cuisine when giving you an elevated experience to
remember. We offer a sophisticated ambiance and unparalleled hospitality, perfect for
intimate dinners, special occasions, or corporate events. Reserve your table today and
experience the best Thai cuisine, served with the utmost care and attention. Your presence
is our present.
In a heartfelt acknowledgment of our achievements, we are deeply grateful for the recognition of our awards, which inspire us to continue sharing our passion and dedication to exceptional hospitality and culinary artistry.
Gallery
Order online
Let's give you a taste of Nahm's style of Thai cuisine from the comfort of your home or office
with our online ordering services. Indulge in our mouth-watering menu offerings made
from the freshest ingredients, meticulously prepared by our culinary team.

Reviews
Review by - Yelp
Lisa N:
Amazing service, food presentation and flavor!  This place is perfect for special occasions.
Review by - Yelp
Martha L:
The best Thai food I have ever had. Granted I have never been to Thailand... The owner, chef is from Thailand and knows a thing or two about food.. Delicious.. Highly recommend.
Review by - Yelp
Nanthana N:
I love eating and trying new restaurants and I found a hidden gem in Alpharetta! Nahm Thai is a fine dining Thai restaurant that not offered high quality of food & services, but also generous quantity.
Review by - Yelp
Tasha G:
Love love love this place. I don't live here, but every time I come with my husband, they remember us and what we ordered the previous time. I will come here every time I'm in Alpharetta.
Review by - Yelp
Brooke R:
Top notch food and service. Highly recommend for business lunch or dinner. Intimate fine dining environment yet not stuffy.

Nahm Fine Thai Cuisine - Food Menu
Our Menu
Dear Guests, We would like to inform you that due to fluctuations in the market, there may be changes in the pricing of certain items on our menu. Please note that we strive to keep our prices fair and reasonable while also providing you with the highest quality ingredients & items. We appreciate your understanding and continued patronage and look forward to serving you soon.
Lunch & Dinner
Desserts
Starters
Fried Tofu (V)
$15.00
Medium firm tofu fried until crispy served with crushed peanut sweet chili sauce.
Crispy Coconut Shrimp
$21.00
Delicious golden fried shrimp coated with panko crumbs, coconut flakes served with mango chili sauce.
Fried Mushroom with Sweet Chili Sauce
$18.00
Fried varieties of mushroom tossed with sweet chili sauce, cashew nut, mint, cilantro, scallion, shallot, tomato.
Roasted Rice Powder Spicy Chicken Wing
$19.00
Marinated fried chicken wings tossed with spicy tangy rice powder, served with sweet chili sauce.

$28.00
Pan-seared sea scallops topped with shallot, microgreens, sweet chili sauce, pink caviar, finger lime.
Crispy Spring Rolls (V)
$15.00

$18.00
Chicken yellow curry with roti dip topped with cilantro.

$19.00

Table Presentation - Choice of: Plain - $25.00 | Tofu – $30.00 | Grilled Jumbo Prawn – $35.00 | Grilled Skirt Steak – $40.00 • Green papaya, carrot, green beans, apple, peanuts, sweet chili lime dressing.

Nahm Fine Thai Cuisine - Drink Menu
Our Drinks
We take pride in our beverage selection, which features a wide variety of wines, cocktails, and spirits that are carefully curated to complement our authentic Thai cuisine.

At Nahm Fine Thai Cuisine, we specialize in featuring niche, family-owned wine producers, some of which are exclusive to our selection. Our wine variety has received recognition from the notable wine spectator magazine over the years. Our staff is knowledgeable and always available to provide expert recommendations and pairings that match your specific taste preferences. On the other hand, if you prefer to bring your own bottle, we do offer a corkage fee of up to $40 per bottle. Every guest deserves a memorable dining experience, and we are committed to providing that through our exceptional beverage offerings.

--- Page: /alpharetta-nahm-fine-thai-cuisine-about-us ---
Nahm Fine Thai Cuisine - About
About
Every story has a beginning, and ours begins with Nahm Stamm, a visionary and culinary
artist. As a child, she was inspired by the leading ladies in her life: her grandmother, mother,
and aunt, who taught her to embrace her culture, cook with love and excellence and live a
fulfilled life. Through the years, Nahm helped her family with their business, which inspired
her to become an entrepreneur. In her young adult years, she studied Art & Fashion and
gained experience in hospitality at the highly-rated Four Seasons in Thailand. But Nahm's
passion for food and entrepreneurship led her to take a leap of faith and move to America
to pursue her dreams. After dining at a Thai restaurant in Atlanta, she realized the guests
were not being given a true taste of Thai cuisine.
This led her to launch Nahm Fine Thai Cuisine, providing her community with authentic
Thai flavors. Nahm's dedication to her craft and her community has paid off. Nahm Fine
Thai Cuisine has received countless awards from Wine Spectator Magazine to become the
top 100 best restaurants on Open Table nationwide. And through it all, Nahm remains true
to her roots and the lessons she learned from her grandmother, mother, and aunt. Every
dish at Nahm Fine Thai Cuisine is made with love and excellence, just like the woman who
inspired Nahm to pursue her dreams. And with her success, Nahm is creating opportunities
for those around her, just like her family did for her. It's a story of inspiration, hard work,
and the power of community.
